mapper.select: select a.insp_req_dt, a.insp_req_no, a.insp_gb, a.prodid, a.linecd, a.progcd, a.ordymd, a.proymd, a.lotno, a.itemcd, b.itemnm, a.prdqty, a.errqty, a.judg_cd from pd_insp_req a left outer join HSBA010T_TBL b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.itemcd = b.itemcd where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.insp_req_dt between #{insp_req_dt_f} and #{insp_req_dt_t} and a.insp_gb = #{insp_gb} and a.linecd = #{linecd} order by a.insp_req_dt desc, a.insp_req_no desc

select a.insp_req_dt, a.insp_req_no, a.prodid, c.rslt_ser, c.rslt_cd, b.CDNM as rsltnm, c.rslt_qty, c.bigo from pd_insp_req a inner join pd_insp_judg c on a.cmpycd = c.cmpycd and a.prodid = c.prodid and a.insp_gb = c.insp_gb and a.insp_req_dt = c.insp_req_dt and a.insp_req_no = c.insp_req_no left outer join HPBA900T_TBL b on c.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and c.rslt_cd = b.CODE and b.CDGBN = '870' where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.insp_req_dt = #{insp_req_dt} and a.insp_req_no = #{insp_req_no} and a.insp_gb = #{insp_gb} order by c.rslt_ser asc
select isnull(sum(rslt_qty), 0) from pd_insp_judg where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and insp_gb = #{insp_gb} and insp_req_dt = #{insp_req_dt} and insp_req_no = #{insp_req_no}
mapper.update: update pd_insp_req set godqty = #{godqty}, errqty = #{errqty}, judg_cd = #{judg_cd} where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and insp_gb = #{insp_gb} and insp_req_dt = #{insp_req_dt} and insp_req_no = #{insp_req_no}
update HPIO220T_TBL set godqty = #{godqty}, errqty = #{errqty} where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and prodid = #{prodid}
mapper.select: select count(*) from HPIO222T_TBL where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and prodid = #{prodid} and inqty > 0
